name: Verdant Cap
description: Verdant Capital is a specialist investment bank and investment manager with extensive experience transacting across the African continent, operating in segments of Specialist Funds, Mergers and Acquisitions, Financial Institutions/Fintech, and Restructuring.

[ ![](https://verdant-cap.com/) ](https://verdant-cap.com/about/)
New opportunities in a changing continent
Verdant Capital is a specialist investment bank and investment manager with exceptional experience transacting across the African continent. Verdant Capital operates in segments: Specialist Funds, Mergers and Acquisitions, Financial Institutions/Fintech and Restructuring.
Verdant Capital is the IMAP partner firm for its region.
### About
[Read More](https://verdant-cap.com/about/)
[ ![](https://verdant-cap.com/) ](https://verdant-cap.com/verdant-imap-advises-miro-forestry-timber-products-on-its-equity-raise/)
Verdant IMAP Advises Miro Forestry & Timber Products on its Equity Raise
Verdant IMAP The equity capital raise was led by Lagata an investment company focused on active investments in sub-Sahara Africa with significant experience in the forestry sector in the West Africa region.

Verdant IMAP Advises on USD 23.4 Million (ZAR 406 Million) Equity Raise to Reunify Ctrack’s Global Telematics Business
Verdant IMAP is pleased to announce that it acted as sole financial advisor and arranger to Ctrack Holding on the successful closing of a USD 23.4 million (ZAR 406 million) equity raise for Ctrack Holdings.

We are not involved in the provision of retail investment products and/or services. Verdant Capital does not solicit money from individuals via social media and/or telephonically.
